LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS HONG GU AND JUAN LIU'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: AS TO LIU, DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COMPLAINT LACKS ANY ALLEGATION AS TO LIU. AS TO GU, DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN TEN DAYS. PLAINTIFF MUST ADDRESS THE STATUTE OF FRAUDS AND PLEAD FACTS DEMONSTRATING THAT IT DOES NOT APPLY. THE FRAUD CAUSE OF ACTION FAILS TO PLEAD FACTS DEMONSTRATING RELIANCE AND DAMAGES. IN THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF DOES NOT PLEAD THAT DEFENDANT IMMIGRATED TO THE U.S.. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
